| NOTE: While contingent fee payments styles are not an uncommon practice, many accountants and lawyers may be unwilling to be paid on a contingent basis due to the inherently larger risk. Target accountants and lawyers you know first and then leverage some of the resources below. |  |  |
|  |  |  |
| ONLINE SOURCES FOR FINDING & HIRING CONTINGENT FEE ADVISORS |  |  |
| LegalMatch.com |  | Search for acqusition-ready lawyers by zip code |
| FindLaw.com |  | Search for M&A lawyers by area |
| LawInfo.com |  | Search for M&A lawyers by area |
| BestLegalChoice.com |  | Post your project & budget and here from professionals |
